tasks.title: Update Main Sponsors Page Form Fields
tasks.description: Align form field names with DTO schema and add missing fields.
tasks.details:
- Replace `sponsorName` with `name`
- Replace `sponsorshipLevel` with `type`
- Replace `displayOrder` with `priorityRanking`
- Remove `sponsorshipAmount` and `benefits` fields (not in DTO)
- Add missing fields: `companyName`, `tagline`, `facebookUrl`, `twitterUrl`, `linkedinUrl`, `instagramUrl`
- Update form validation rules
- Update form submission handler to match DTO structure
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the form fields match the DTO schema and that form submission sends the correct data structure to the API.

tasks.title: Implement ImageUpload Component Integration
tasks.description: Replace URL input fields with ImageUpload component for logo, hero, and banner images.
tasks.details:
- Replace URL input fields with `ImageUpload` component for logo, hero, and banner images
- Determine how to handle `eventId` requirement for the main sponsors page
- Configure ImageUpload component with appropriate entityType ('sponsor') and imageType ('logo', 'hero', 'banner')
- Implement image preview functionality
- Handle image upload state and errors
- Update form data when images are uploaded successfully
tasks.testStrategy: Test image upload for all three types (logo, hero, banner), verify preview functionality, and confirm that image URLs are correctly saved to the sponsor record.

tasks.title: Verify and Update API Server Actions
tasks.description: Ensure API server actions match DTO structure and use correct HTTP methods.
tasks.details:
- Verify `createEventSponsorServer` matches DTO structure
- Verify `updateEventSponsorServer` uses PATCH correctly for partial updates
- Ensure `withTenantId` is applied to all mutations
- Add error handling improvements
- Verify that all CRUD operations respect tenant isolation
tasks.testStrategy: Test all CRUD operations through the API server actions, verify correct HTTP methods, and confirm tenant isolation is enforced.

tasks.title: Implement Sponsor CRUD Operations UI
tasks.description: Complete the user interface for sponsor CRUD operations.
tasks.details:
- Create modal or page for adding new sponsors
- Implement edit sponsor functionality
- Implement view sponsor details
- Implement delete sponsor confirmation dialog
- Add loading states for all operations
- Add toast notifications for success/error feedback
- Implement form validation with error messages
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete CRUD flow from the UI, including form validation, loading states, and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Search and Filter Functionality
tasks.description: Add search and filter capabilities to the sponsors list.
tasks.details:
- Implement search by sponsor name
- Add filter by sponsor type
- Add filter by active/inactive status
- Implement sorting by priority ranking and name
- Add pagination controls
- Connect filters to API query parameters
tasks.testStrategy: Test search and filter functionality with different combinations of criteria, verify pagination works correctly.

tasks.title: Implement Event-Sponsor Association Management
tasks.description: Create UI for managing event-sponsor associations.
tasks.details:
- Create interface to assign existing sponsors to events
- Implement removing sponsors from events
- Add view to see all sponsors for a specific event
- Add view to see all events for a specific sponsor
- Prevent duplicate associations
- Handle cascade delete when event or sponsor is deleted
tasks.testStrategy: Test creating and removing associations, verify duplicate prevention, and test cascade delete behavior.

tasks.title: Apply UI/UX Style Guide
tasks.description: Ensure the sponsors management UI follows established style guidelines.
tasks.details:
- Apply sacred design system colors and typography
- Match admin page styling patterns
- Ensure consistent form layouts and spacing
- Implement responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
- Add appropriate loading states
- Ensure error handling follows UI patterns
- Match styling with event-specific sponsors page
tasks.testStrategy: Verify UI matches style guide standards, test responsiveness on different devices, and confirm consistent styling across the application.

tasks.title: Verify DTO Type Definitions
tasks.description: Ensure EventSponsorsDTO matches the backend schema.
tasks.details:
- Verify `EventSponsorsDTO` in `src/types/index.ts` matches backend schema
- Check if `event_id` field in database should be included in DTO
- Ensure all required fields are marked as such
- Verify field types match database schema
- Update DTO if necessary
tasks.testStrategy: Compare DTO with database schema and backend API documentation, verify all fields are correctly typed.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Tenant Support
tasks.description: Ensure all operations respect tenant isolation.
tasks.details:
- Verify all API calls include `tenantId` in request body
- Ensure backend automatically filters by tenant
- Confirm tenant ID is sourced from `NEXT_PUBLIC_TENANT_ID` environment variable
- Verify `withTenantId` utility is used for payload injection
- Test tenant isolation at all levels
tasks.testStrategy: Test API calls with different tenant IDs, verify data isolation between tenants, and confirm tenant ID is correctly applied to all requests.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing
tasks.description: Perform thorough testing of the entire sponsors management system.
tasks.details:
- Test all CRUD operations
- Test image uploads for all three types
- Test event-sponsor associations
- Test multi-tenant isolation
- Test form validation and error handling
- Test search, filter, and pagination
- Test responsive design
- Test loading states and error scenarios
- Verify authentication requirements
tasks.testStrategy: Create a comprehensive test plan covering all functional and non-functional requirements, test edge cases, and verify all success criteria are met.
